title: Bangladesh Motor Vehicle Registration Application (BRTA "Form of Application for the Registration of Motor Vehicle")
description: The Bangladesh Road Transport Authority's (BRTA) "Form of Application for the Registration of Motor Vehicle", the application an owner files to register a motor vehicle in Bangladesh. Opens Bangladesh's DMV vertical (2 of 6), following the Taxes vertical opened by `bd/nbr/individual-income-tax-return-form-it-11ga`. The live, unauthenticated, English-language, vector-text 3-page source is a plain print-and-fill document (no AcroForm widgets, confirmed via pdfjs-dist: 0 field objects across all 3 pages) — a numbered-line-item form, not a fillable form. Page 1's "Section-1" is an office-only intake box (registration number, issue number, diary number, customer ID, district, vehicle ID, refusal tracking), followed by "Section II" (owner information, items 1-13) and "Section III" (vehicle identification and technical specification, items 14-31). Page 1 closes with "Section IV" (items 32-38, additional information applicable to transport vehicles: tyre count/size, axle count and per-axle maximum weight, overall dimensions, overhangs, and a vehicle-dimension-drawing attachment line). Page 2's "Section V" (items 39-41) covers hire-purchase/hypothecation particulars, insurance particulars, and joint-owner particulars, all owner-supplied; "Section VI" (items 42-46) is a declaration/certificates block comprising the owner's own sworn declaration (modeled here as a documents[] attestation), a registered dealer's certificate, an Inspector of Motor Vehicles' certificate, a registration-status adjudication, and a fees/tax account line — the latter four are generated or completed by the dealer, the inspecting officer, or the registering authority, not the applicant, and are out of scope. Page 3, "Owner's Particulars/Specimen Signature", duplicates identity and vehicle-identification data already captured in Sections II/III (name, father/husband, address, sex, phone, nationality, date of birth, guardian's name, chassis number, engine number, year of manufacture, previous registration number, P.O./Bank) alongside four specimen-signature boxes and a passport-photo/stamp box; this v1.0.0 excludes page 3's duplicate data and signature boxes as out of scope, retaining only its 3-copies-photograph requirement as a documents[] entry. This v1.0.0 models the applicant-facing content of Sections II through V (owner identification, vehicle/technical specification, transport-vehicle-specific technical detail, and hire-purchase/insurance/joint-owner particulars); the office-only Section-1 intake box, Section VI's dealer/inspector/registering-authority certificates and fee line, and page 3's duplicate identity/signature/photo-box layout (save for the photograph requirement itself) are out of scope for this v1.0.0, disclosed in VERIFICATION.md. GovSchema is independent and is not affiliated with, endorsed by, or operated by the Government of Bangladesh or the Bangladesh Road Transport Authority.

source.documentRef: "Form of Application for the Registration of Motor Vehicle", Bangladesh Road Transport Authority, published at https://brta.gov.bd/pages/forms/6922d9b3933eb65569dff7ec

verification.notes: GovSchema Standard Research cycle GOV-2644. Opens Bangladesh's DMV vertical (2 of 6). Independently re-fetched the object-storage-hosted PDF this cycle via curl -sk with a Chrome-like User-Agent (the host's TLS chain fails default verification): HTTP 200, Content-Type application/pdf, 71911 bytes, sha256 96d0e10bcb05988ec2cb31419656121440b5602353493c33e91b38d412721223 — matching the prior scouting pass's reported figures exactly, independently re-derived, not copied. The BRTA forms page (https://brta.gov.bd/pages/forms/6922d9b3933eb65569dff7ec) also independently re-confirmed reachable, HTTP 200. Parsed the downloaded PDF with pdfjs-dist@6 (legacy build): 3 pages, getFieldObjects() returned null (no AcroForm widgets — a plain print-and-fill document, matching the driving-licence variant's dead-end characterization from the same forms page this cycle: garbled/no field metadata), and getTextContent() returned a full, clean English text layer across all 3 pages totalling 4801 characters (matching the prior pass's reported ~4,801 exactly). Every field in this schema was extracted directly from this text layer, additionally cross-checked by rendering all 3 pages to PNG at 3x scale via pdfjs-dist + @napi-rs/canvas and visually inspecting the rendered images, specifically to check for printed checkbox/option lists next to items the prior scouting pass had flagged as possible enums (Sex, Owner type, Vehicle or trailer, Class of vehicle, Fuel used). None of the five had any printed checkbox, radio option, or enumerated value list anywhere on the rendered page — each is simply a label followed by a blank colon-terminated line. Given this task's own instruction to identify enum values directly from the form's own text layer, and finding none, this schema deviates from the prior scouting brief by modeling ownerType, ownerSex, classOfVehicle, and fuelUsed as free-text string (not enum), consistent with this registry's own established th/dlt/vehicle-registration-application precedent of not inventing enum value sets for blank lines with no printed options. The sole exception is vehicleOrTrailer, modeled as a 2-value enum, because the printed label itself names exactly two mutually exclusive options ("Vehicle or trailer"), not because a checkbox exists.

fields.name: ownerName
fields.label: Name of owner
fields.sourceRef: Page 1, Section II, item 1: "Name of owner :"

fields.name: ownerDateOfBirth
fields.label: Date of birth
fields.sourceRef: Page 1, Section II, item 2: "Date of birth :"

fields.name: ownerSex
fields.label: Sex
fields.description: Modeled as free-text, not enum: the printed line reads only "Sex :" with no adjacent checkbox, radio mark, or printed option list (confirmed by rendering the page at 3x scale and visually inspecting it), unlike several other jurisdictions' own forms in this registry that print explicit "Male Female" options. Disclosed judgment call in VERIFICATION.md.

fields.name: guardianName
fields.label: Guardian's name
fields.description: Distinct from fatherOrHusbandName; the source prints both as separate items with no further gating instruction (e.g. applicable when the owner is a minor).

fields.name: ownerAddress
fields.label: Owner's Address
fields.description: The source prints "Owner's Address (One only)", indicating a single combined address entry rather than a multi-line/multi-field breakdown.
fields.sourceRef: Page 1, Section II, item 7: "Owner's Address (One only) :"

fields.name: ownerPhone
fields.label: Phone No.
fields.sourceRef: Page 1, Section II, item 8: "Phone No. (if any) :"

fields.name: ownerPostOfficeOrBank
fields.label: P.O./Bank
fields.description: Distinct from the office-only "P.O./Bank" entry printed in Section-1's intake box; this is the owner-supplied item 9 within Section II.

fields.name: jointOwner
fields.label: Joint owner
fields.description: Gates the Section V joint-owner particulars (jointOwner1Name, jointOwner1FatherOrHusbandName).

fields.name: ownerType
fields.label: Owner type
fields.description: Modeled as free-text: the source prints only "Owner type :" with no printed option list.

fields.name: hirePurchase
fields.label: Hire purchase
fields.description: Gates the Section V hire-purchase/hypothecation particulars (hirePurchaseFinancierName, hirePurchaseAgreementDate, hirePurchaseFinancierAddress).

fields.name: vehicleOrTrailer
fields.label: Vehicle or trailer
fields.description: The only field in this schema modeled as enum without a printed checkbox present, because the printed label itself names exactly two mutually exclusive options.
fields.sourceRef: Page 1, Section III, item 14: "Vehicle or trailer :"

fields.name: classOfVehicle
fields.label: Class of vehicle
fields.description: Modeled as free-text: the source prints only "Class of vehicle :" with no printed option list.
fields.sourceRef: Page 1, Section III, item 14a: "Class of vehicle :"

fields.name: previousRegistrationNumber
fields.label: Prev. Regn. No.
fields.sourceRef: Page 1, Section III, item 15: "Prev. Regn. No. (if any) :"

fields.name: typeOfBody
fields.label: Type of body
fields.sourceRef: Page 1, Section III, item 16: "Type of body :"

fields.name: yearOfManufacture
fields.label: Year of manufacture
fields.sourceRef: Page 1, Section III, item 19: "Year of manufacture :"

fields.name: numberOfCylinders
fields.label: Number of cylinders
fields.sourceRef: Page 1, Section III, item 20: "Number of cylinders :"

fields.name: fuelUsed
fields.label: Fuel used
fields.description: Modeled as free-text: the source prints only "Fuel used :" with no printed option list, despite fuel type being a plausible enum elsewhere.

fields.name: numberOfStandee
fields.label: No. of Standee
fields.sourceRef: Page 1, Section III, item 28: "No. of Standee :"

fields.name: wheelBase
fields.label: Wheel base
fields.description: No unit is printed on this line. Item 36's dimensions are explicitly labeled "(mm)"; wheel base is likely also millimetres by analogy, but the form itself does not state a unit for this item, so none is asserted here beyond the label as printed.

fields.name: maxLadenOrTrainWeightKg
fields.label: Maximum laden/train weight (kg)
fields.sourceRef: Page 1, Section III, item 31: "Maximum laden/train weight (kg) :"

fields.name: numberOfTyres
fields.label: No. of types
fields.description: The source's own printed text reads "No. of types :" verbatim. Given its position immediately before item 33 ("Tyres size") and item 34 ("No. of axle"), this almost certainly denotes a count of tyres, not vehicle "types", but this schema does not silently correct the source's own printed wording — the label above is verbatim, and the field name reflects the almost-certain intended meaning. Disclosed in VERIFICATION.md. Applicable only to transport vehicles, per this section's own "Additional information for transport vehicle" heading; the source has no dedicated boolean gate for this, so it is left optional rather than encoding a fabricated requiredWhen condition.
fields.sourceRef: Page 1, Section IV, item 32: "No. of types :"

fields.name: numberOfAxles
fields.label: No. of axle
fields.sourceRef: Page 1, Section IV, item 34: "No. of axle :"

fields.name: frontAxleWeightKg1
fields.label: Maximum axle weight (kg): Front axle (1)
fields.description: First of 2 source-printed front-axle-weight blanks (a bounded repeating group per the source's own numbering, not an unbounded array).

fields.name: centralAxleWeightKg1
fields.label: Maximum axle weight (kg): Central axle (1)
fields.description: First of 3 source-printed central-axle-weight blanks (a bounded repeating group per the source's own numbering, not an unbounded array).

fields.name: rearAxleWeightKg1
fields.label: Maximum axle weight (kg): Rear axle (1)
fields.description: First of 3 source-printed rear-axle-weight blanks (a bounded repeating group per the source's own numbering, not an unbounded array).

fields.name: vehicleDimensionDrawingApprovedBy
fields.label: Vehicle dimension drawing approved by
fields.description: Companion to the vehicleDimensionDrawing document entry.
fields.sourceRef: Page 1, Section IV, item 38: "...approved by....................on..............................is attached herewith"

fields.name: vehicleDimensionDrawingApprovalDate
fields.label: Vehicle dimension drawing approval date
fields.description: Companion to the vehicleDimensionDrawing document entry.
fields.sourceRef: Page 1, Section IV, item 38: "...approved by....................on..............................is attached herewith"

fields.name: hirePurchaseFinancierName
fields.label: Hire purchase/hypothecation: financier's name
fields.sourceRef: Page 2, Section V, item 39a: "The vehicle is subject to hire purchase/hypothecation with : Name :"

fields.name: insurancePolicyNumber
fields.label: Insurance: Policy no.
fields.description: Third-party motor insurance is a standard prerequisite for vehicle registration in Bangladesh, but this form itself has no dedicated boolean gate for insurance particulars (unlike hirePurchase/jointOwner), so this and the other insurance items are left optional rather than encoding a fabricated requiredWhen condition. Disclosed in VERIFICATION.md.

fields.name: insurancePolicyType
fields.label: Insurance: Type of policy
fields.sourceRef: Page 2, Section V, item 40b: "Type of policy :"

fields.name: insurerNameAndAddress
fields.label: Insurance: Insurer's name & address
fields.sourceRef: Page 2, Section V, item 40c: "Insurer's name & address :"

fields.name: insurancePolicyExpiryDate
fields.label: Insurance: Date of expiry
fields.sourceRef: Page 2, Section V, item 40b (second, mislabeled "b"): "Date of expiry :"

fields.name: jointOwner1Name
fields.label: Joint owner: Name (1)
fields.description: First of 2 source-printed joint-owner name/relation blanks (a bounded repeating group per the source's own "a)"/"b)" column layout, not an unbounded array).

fields.name: jointOwner2Name
fields.label: Joint owner: Name (2)
fields.description: Second of the 2 source-printed joint-owner columns. The source gates the joint-owner block on the single jointOwner boolean but does not further distinguish whether a second joint owner is mandatory or optional given a first, so this second slot is left unconditionally optional.

documents.label: Owner's sworn declaration of accuracy
documents.statement: I the undersigned do hereby declare that to the best of my knowledge and belief, the information given and the documents enclosed (as per list attached) are true. I also declare that in case the papers/documents and information furnished are found to be incorrect at any later stage, I shall be liable for legal action.
documents.sourceRef: Page 2, Section VI, item 42(a): "Declaration by owner"

documents.label: Copy of the vehicle dimension/body/seating-arrangement drawing
documents.handling: Applicable only to transport vehicles whose body/seating arrangement requires an approved drawing; companion to the vehicleDimensionDrawingApprovedBy and vehicleDimensionDrawingApprovalDate fields, which carry the approver name and date printed on this same checklist line.
documents.sourceRef: Page 1, Section IV, item 38: "A copy of the drawing showing the vehicle dimension specifications of the body and of the seating arrangements approved by....................on..............................is attached herewith"

documents.label: Owner's photograph (3 copies)
documents.handling: The only page-3 ("Owner's Particulars/Specimen Signature") item retained in this v1.0.0; the rest of page 3 duplicates identity/vehicle-identification data already captured by the fields above (name, father/husband, address, sex, phone, nationality, date of birth, guardian's name, chassis number, engine number, year of manufacture, previous registration number, P.O./Bank) and four wet-ink specimen-signature boxes, none of which are separately modeled. Disclosed in VERIFICATION.md.
